# calibrationMode

**Instance Property**

A sound pressure level strategy for loudness correction.

## Declaration

```swift
var calibrationMode: PHASECalibrationMode { get }
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASECalibrationMode/none]. To set a value, call [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEGeneratorNodeDefinition/setCalibrationMode(calibrationMode:level:)].

## Calibrating Loudness

- **setCalibrationMode(calibrationMode:level:)**: Selects a loudness correction strategy and reference level.
- **level**: The node’s loudness.
